sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Eite pai na lam hong taang sak hi
A mah tawh pai khawm in
A thu ngai a muang a om ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Muang un, ngai un, Lampi dang om lo hi
Muang in a thu ngai un

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Van a gik te pua a
Gim na tawl na thuak na
hong heh pih na ki cing hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni lim a hih hang in
Meii kai a hih hang in
Tau na leh kah na te
Jesuh i muan’ lai in om thei

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kikhawm ciangin lam pai khawm ding
Cikmah hun lau loin nuam ding hi
